rulings.Case Title: HARVEY VS ABB LUMMUS GLOBAL, INC*
ESTATE OF ANDREW ROA VS MCI WORLDCOM INC
rulings.Calendar Matter: Deft Ccsf Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings As To Pltf John Eicher, Memo P/A , Declaration

rulings.Rulings: GRANT, NO OPPOSITION FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER COMPLY WITH CCP 437C(G).

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT BY FLUOR DENIED. BURDEN SHIFTED BY SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT CREATED BY ROLAFF DECLARATION. PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE SIGNED COPY OF DECLARATION AT HEARING. (CW)

rulings.Case Title: ALICEA VS GOLDEN EAGLE INSURANCE CORP
rulings.Rulings: DENY BECAUSE (1)MOTION VIOLATES CCP 437C(F)(2) AND NO SHOWING OF DILIGENCE WITH RE TO "NEW FACTS"; (2)SEPARATE STATEMENT VIOLATES CRC 342; (3)LA JOLLA SUPPLEMENTED DISCOVERY ANSWERS AND (4)INDEMNITY PROVISION IS TYPE II AND THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE RE WHETHER DEFENDANT'S CONDUCT IS ACTIVE OR PASSIVE NEGLIGENCE. SEE MACDONALD & KRUSE, INC. V. SAN JOSE STEEL CO., INC., (1972) 29 CAL.APP.3D 413, 419. (PB)

rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS JEN

rulings.Rulings: DENY AS TO 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION. EVEN IF THE COURT WERE TO RELY ON NY LAW, THERE IS A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE WHETHER DEFENDANT BREACHED ITS FIDUCIARY OBLIGATION BY DISCHARGING PLAINTIFF BECAUSE OF HER AGE. SEE GELDER MEDICAL GROUP V. WEBBER, 41 N.Y.2D 680, 684. DENY AS TO 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION. THE UCL IS NOT LIMITED TO CONSUMERS AND COMPETITORS. EVEN EMPLOYEES HAVE BEEN ABLE TO MAINTAIN SUCH ACTIONS AGAINST THEIR EMPLOYERS. SEE HUDGINS V. NEIMAN MARCUS GROUP, INC., (1995) 34 CAL.APP.4TH 1109. DENY AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION 9. TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT RE OUTRAGEOUS CONDUCT AND DEGREE OF DISTRESS. GRANT AS TO 10TH CAUSE OF ACTION. ACTIONS ARE INTENTIONAL. SEE SEMORE VS. POOL 217 CAL.APP.3D 1087, 1105. (PB)
TO BE HEARD IN DEPT. 301, ODD NUMBERED CASE.
